detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Better._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Better.sol#647-771):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Better.sol#711)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Better.sol#785-797)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Better.sol#717)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Better.sol#805)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Better.sol#769)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Better.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Better.sol#911)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Better.sol#913)
	Better._rOwned (Better.sol#323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Better._takeTeam(uint256) (Better.sol#925-933)
	- Better._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Better.sol#885-921)
	- Better.balanceOf(address) (Better.sol#473-477)
	- Better.constructor() (Better.sol#407-437)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Better.sol#769)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Better.sol#939)
	Better._rTotal (Better.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Better._getCurrentSupply() (Better.sol#1081-1091)
	- Better._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Better.sol#937-943)
	- Better.constructor() (Better.sol#407-437)
	- Better.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Better.sol#569-591)
detectors.markdown:

		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](Better.sol#L913)
	[Better._rOwned](Better.sol#L323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:

	- [Better.balanceOf(address)](Better.sol#L473-L477)
	- [Better.constructor()](Better.sol#L407-L437)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Better.sol#L769)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Better.sol#L939)
	[Better._rTotal](Better.sol#L335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:

	- [Better._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](Better.sol#L937-L943)
